# Project Custom Instructions

## TO-DO List for All Tasks
- Always update to-do list with below items for every task:
  - [ ] Validate requirements with clarifying questions
  - [ ] Implement the change
  - [ ] Test and verify functionality
  - [ ] Update documentation
  - [ ] Commit and push changes

## Skills & Tools
- Always use the skills installed in this project: **UI/UX Pro**, **Superpowers**, and **Supabase**.
- Always use the **Supabase MCP** for all database and backend operations.

## Requirements Validation
- Before implementing any new requirement, **challenge and validate** it by asking as many clarifying questions as needed to fully understand the scope, edge cases, acceptance criteria, and dependencies.
- Do not proceed with implementation until the requirement is fully understood.

## Testing & Verification
- After completing any change, **always test and verify** the changes work correctly.
- Run relevant test suites and confirm expected behavior before considering a task done.

## Documentation
- After every change, **update all relevant documentation** including:
  - README files
  - API docs
  - Inline code comments
  - Changelog or release notes (if applicable)

## Git Workflow
- Always **commit and push** changes after completion.
- Use clear, descriptive commit messages.
